name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, unexpected subscription charges cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and managing recurring subscription expenses.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking and managing recurring subscription expenses.

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of subscriptions using spreadsheets.
